# AI4PB Task List Skill

Use `#ai4pb-task-list` for sprint planning output of consolidated prioritized tasks.

Execution rule:
1. First run `#ai4pb-task-support`.
2. Then run `#ai4pb-task-list`.
3. Follow the task-list prompt strictly and do not add out-of-scope tasks.
